specific_location: Cemetary on north side of town.
description: Small bird with straight needle bill with white belly and gray top with black eyeline. No question of ID. Got some pictures which are attached.Behaviors: Running in a small pack with quick jerky movements. Climbing all over the pine tree with there feet. Able to hand upside down with their good grip.Call: The high clear short and rapid pip of the flock was heard.Plumage: N/A
